summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ideaGround platform. All major features are working excellently with the fixed authentication system. Frontend authentication now works perfectly with session tokens, and all protected routes are accessible.

design_issues.issue: Search functionality works but results display could be improved - only shows 2 videos for 'dance' search
Transaction History section header shows but actual transaction list is properly displayed

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Google Sign In button and proper branding
Authentication system working perfectly with session tokens
Dashboard page loads with welcome message, wallet balance, video cards, creator cards
Video player page with YouTube embeds, stock ticker, price charts
Buy shares functionality with dialog, slider, input controls
Like video functionality working
Subscribe to creator functionality working
Portfolio page with holdings, pie chart, total portfolio value
Sell shares functionality with dialog and controls
Wallet page with balance display, transaction history, add funds dialog
Explore page with search functionality and video results
Navigation between all pages working (Home, Portfolio, Wallet, Explore)
Mobile responsiveness working on all pages
Error handling for invalid video IDs
Light orange theme properly implemented
Proper spacing and layout design
Complete buy shares flow functional
Stock ticker with price history charts
Video tabs (All, Shorts, Full Videos) working
Creator cards and video cards clickable and functional

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major features working, minor UI improvements possible)
